s3.bucket.accelerateconfiguration.CfnAbo: Configures the transfer acceleration state for an Amazon S3 bucket. For more information, see [Amazon S3 Transfer Acceleration](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/dev/transfer-acceleration.html) in the *Amazon S3 User Guide*.

s3.bucket.accelerateconfiguration.Accele.Description: Specifies the transfer acceleration status of the bucket.
